steps.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT artist,sum(timesplayed) AS total      
  FROM songs      
  GROUP BY LOWER(artist)

SELECT DISTINCT artist,sum(timesplayed) AS total      
    FROM songs      
    GROUP BY LOWER(artist)      
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

SELECT DISTINCT artist,sum(timesplayed) AS total      
    FROM songs      
    GROUP BY LOWER(artist)      
    LIMIT 2 OFFSET 1

SELECT DISTINCT artist,sum(timesplayed) AS total      
    FROM songs      
    GROUP BY LOWER(artist)      
    LIMIT -1 OFFSET 2
